1.name: Wireless Headphones
1.description: Noise-cancelling over-ear headphones with 30-hour battery life and premium sound quality.

2.name: Smart Watch
2.description: Fitness tracker with heart-rate monitor, GPS, and 7-day battery life.

3.name: Running Shoes
3.description: Lightweight and breathable shoes with responsive cushioning for all distances.

4.name: Yoga Mat
4.description: Non-slip, eco-friendly 6mm thick mat with alignment lines and carry strap.

5.name: Coffee Maker
5.description: 12-cup programmable drip coffee maker with built-in grinder and thermal carafe.

6.name: Leather Wallet
6.description: Slim genuine leather bi-fold wallet with RFID blocking and 8 card slots.

7.name: Sunglasses
7.description: Polarized UV400 protection sunglasses with titanium frames and scratch-resistant lenses.

8.name: Water Bottle
8.description: Double-walled insulated stainless steel bottle, keeps cold 24h and hot 12h.

9.name: Desk Lamp
9.description: LED desk lamp with adjustable color temperature, USB charging port, and touch control.

10.name: Mechanical Keyboard
10.description: Compact TKL mechanical keyboard with tactile switches and per-key RGB backlighting.
